response: Acme Corp, a company headquartered in Austin, TX with 342 employees, reported quarterly revenues of $12.3M (Q1), $14.1M (Q2), $11.8M (Q3), and $16.2M (Q4), totaling $54.4M in annual revenue. This strong financial performance delivered an 18% year-over-year (YoY) growth rate, marking a successful fiscal period for the firm.
